plantedAmbiguities.segmentText: Members get a digest of workspace activity.
plantedAmbiguities.summary: The delivery channel is never stated (email, in-app, chat).
plantedAmbiguities.exampleAssumption: Email to the member's account address.

plantedAmbiguities.summary: Daily at what time, and in whose timezone?
plantedAmbiguities.exampleQuestion: What send time and timezone does daily mean?

plantedAmbiguities.summary: Opt-out scope is unstated: per workspace or account-wide.
plantedAmbiguities.exampleQuestion: Does opting out apply per workspace or to the whole account?

plantedAmbiguities.segmentText: Old digests are cleaned up eventually.
plantedAmbiguities.exampleQuestion: How long are past digests retained?

requirementSegments.segmentText: Members get a digest of workspace activity.
requirementSegments.statement: Each member receives a digest of workspace activity.
The digest is delivered once per day.
A member can opt out of the digest.

requirementSegments.segmentText: The digest lists new documents and comments.
requirementSegments.statement: The digest lists new documents and comments since the prior digest.

requirementSegments.segmentText: Old digests are cleaned up eventually.
requirementSegments.statement: Digests older than the retention period are removed.
